stemHtml: In a holding pattern where the outbound leg is defined by DME distance, when does the outbound leg terminate?

options.a: As soon as the limiting DME distance is reached.
options.b: 0.5 NM before reaching the limiting DME distance.
options.c: Half a minute before reaching the limiting DME distance.
options.d: 1 NM before reaching the limiting DME distance.
